chunks.title: v2.7.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all
Release: v2.7.0
Tag: v2.7.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-02-08T18:44:47Z; created_at: 2024-02-08T17:31:13Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* **Add 12 new model architectures for CPU and Metal inference** (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1914)
These are Baichuan, BLOOM, CodeShell, GPT-2, Orion, Persimmon, Phi and Phi-2, Plamo, Qwen, Qwen2, Refact, and StableLM.
We don't have official downloads for these yet, but [TheBloke](https://huggingface.co/TheBloke) offers plenty of compatible GGUF quantizations.
* Restore minimum window size of 720x480 (1b524c46179ce94cfdba676cebd373d25189e538)
* Use ChatML for Mistral OpenOrca to make its output formatting more reliable (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1935)
## Bug Fixes
* Fix VRAM not being freed when CPU fallback occurs - this makes switching models more reliable (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1901)
* Disable offloading of Mixtral to GPU because we crash otherwise (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1931)
* **Limit extensions scanned by LocalDocs to txt, pdf, md, rst** - other formats were inserting useless binary data (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1912)
* Fix missing scrollbar for chat history (490404dbb285b89d28964e5389b730ffedfcd7fd)
* Accessibility improvements (4258bb1f8a767fca706008e2296cb9d59661bcb2)
## New Contributors
* @boshk0 made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1924
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/compare/v2.6.2...v2.7.0
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v2.7.0, the project adds 12 new model architectures for CPU and Metal inference: Baichuan, BLOOM, CodeShell, GPT-2, Orion, Persimmon, Phi and Phi-2, Plamo, Qwen, Qwen2, Refact, and StableLM. It restores a minimum window size of 720x480, uses ChatML for Mistral OpenOrca to improve output formatting reliability, and includes bug fixes for VRAM freeing on CPU fallback, Mixtral GPU offloading, LocalDocs extension scanning limited to txt, pdf, md, rst, missing scrollbar for chat history, and accessibility improvements.

chunks.title: v2.7.1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all
Release: v2.7.1
Tag: v2.7.1; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-02-26T17:10:15Z; created_at: 2024-02-21T21:53:33Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Completely revamp model loading to support explicit unload/reload (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1969)
* We no longer load a model by default on application start
* We no longer load a model by default on chat context switch
* Save and restore of window geometry across application starts (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1989)
* Update to latest llama.cpp as of 2/21/2024 and add CPU/GPU support for Gemma (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1992)
* Also enable Vulkan GPU support for Phi and Phi-2, Qwen2, and StableLM
## Fixes
* Fix visual artifact in update reminder dialog (16927d9)
* Blacklist Intel GPUs as they are still not supported (a1471be, https://github.com/nomic-ai/llama.cpp/pull/14)
* Improve chat save/load speed (excluding startup/shutdown with defaults) (6fdec80, https://github.com/nomic-ai/llama.cpp/pull/15)
* Significantly improve handling of chat-style prompt templates, and reupload Mistral OpenOrca (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1970, https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1993)
## New Contributors
* @simonw made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1964
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/compare/v2.7.0...v2.7.1
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v2.7.1, the model loading is completely revamped to support explicit unload/reload, and models are no longer loaded by default on application start or chat context switch. Window geometry is saved and restored across application starts. The llama.cpp backend is updated as of 2/21/2024, adding CPU/GPU support for Gemma and enabling Vulkan GPU support for Phi, Phi-2, Qwen2, and StableLM. Fixes include a visual artifact in the update reminder dialog, blacklisting Intel GPUs, improving chat save/load speed, and significantly improving handling of chat-style prompt templates with a reupload of Mistral OpenOrca.

chunks.title: v2.7.2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all
Release: v2.7.2
Tag: v2.7.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-03-13T20:45:31Z; created_at: 2024-03-05T18:14:55Z
Release notes:
## What's New
* **Model Discovery:** Discover new LLMs from HuggingFace, right from GPT4All! (83c76be68a600f8c65d4eed53c0cd7497697559d)
* Support GPU offload of Gemma's output tensor (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1997)
* Enable Kompute support for 10 more model architectures (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2005)
* These are Baichuan, Bert and Nomic Bert, CodeShell, GPT-2, InternLM, MiniCPM, Orion, Qwen, and StarCoder.
* Expose min_p sampling parameter of llama.cpp by @chrisbarrera in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2014
* Default to a blank line between reply and next prompt for templates without `%2` (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1996)
* Add Nous-Hermes-2-Mistral-7B-DPO to official models list by @ThiloteE in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2027
## Fixes
* Fix compilation warnings on macOS (e7f2ff189fcc1c5cab25796e61d7045e18ff331f)
* Fix crash when ChatGPT API key is set, and hide non-ChatGPT settings properly (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2003)
* Fix crash when adding/removing a clone - a regression in v2.7.1 (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2031)
* Fix layer norm epsilon value in BERT model (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1946)
* Fix clones being created with the wrong number of GPU layers (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2011)
## New Contributors
* @TareHimself made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1897
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/compare/v2.7.1...v2.7.2
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v2.7.2, a Model Discovery feature is introduced to discover new LLMs from HuggingFace directly within GPT4All. GPU offload of Gemma's output tensor is supported, Kompute support is enabled for 10 more model architectures (Baichuan, Bert and Nomic Bert, CodeShell, GPT-2, InternLM, MiniCPM, Orion, Qwen, StarCoder), the min_p sampling parameter from llama.cpp is exposed, a blank line is defaulted between reply and next prompt for templates without %2, and Nous-Hermes-2-Mistral-7B-DPO is added to the official models list. Fixes address compilation warnings on macOS, crashes with ChatGPT API key and clone add/remove, layer norm epsilon in BERT, and wrong number of GPU layers for clones.

chunks.title: v2.7.3
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all
Release: v2.7.3
Tag: v2.7.3; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-03-13T20:45:34Z; created_at: 2024-03-11T18:34:28Z
Release notes:
## What's New
* Groundwork for "removedIn" field of models3.json based on unused "deprecated" field (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2063)
* Implement warning dialog for old Mistral OpenOrca (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2034)
* Make deleting a chat significantly faster (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2081)
* New, smaller MPT model without duplicated tensor (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2006)
* Make API server port configurable by @danielmeloalencar in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1640
* Show settings for the currently selected model by default (by @chrisbarrera in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2099, e2f64f89c9f32b924b4b3ba317319eb4ea1d15ae)
* Keep installed models in the list when searching for models (5ed9aea41054f609eb4f9329493d999525efdd6a)
## Fixes
* Fix "Download models" button not appearing on some Linux systems (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2040)
* Fix undefined behavior in ChatLLM::resetContext (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2041)
* Fix ChatGPT restore from text after v2.7.1 (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2051 part 1)
* Fix ChatGPT using context from messages that are no longer in history (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2051 part 2)
* Fix TypeError warnings on exit (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2043)
* Fix startup speed regression from v2.7.2 (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2089, https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2094)
* Do not show SBert and non-GUI models in choices for "Default model" (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2095)
* Do not list cloned models on downloads page (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2090)
* Do not attempt to show old, deleted models in downloads list (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2098)
* Fix inability to cancel model download (https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2107)
## New Contributors
* @danielmeloalencar made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1640
* @johannesploetner made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1979
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/compare/v2.7.2...v2.7.3
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v2.7.3, groundwork is laid for a 'removedIn' field in models3.json based on an unused 'deprecated' field. A warning dialog is implemented for old Mistral OpenOrca, chat deletion is made significantly faster, a new smaller MPT model without duplicated tensor is introduced, the API server port is made configurable, settings for the currently selected model are shown by default, and installed models are kept in the list when searching. Fixes include the 'Download models' button not appearing on some Linux systems, undefined behavior in ChatLLM::resetContext, ChatGPT restore from text and context issues after v2.7.1, TypeError warnings on exit, startup speed regression from v2.7.2, hiding SBert and non-GUI models from default model choices, not listing cloned models on downloads page, not showing old deleted models in downloads list, and inability to cancel model download.

chunks.title: v2.7.4
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all
Release: v2.7.4
Tag: v2.7.4; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-04-26T18:10:09Z; created_at: 2024-04-26T16:55:10Z
Release notes:
## What's New
* Add a right-click menu to the chat (by @kryotek777 in [#2108](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2108))
* Change the left sidebar to stay open ([#2117](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2117))
* Limit the width of text in the chat ([#2118](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2118))
* Move to llama.cpp's SBert implementation ([#2086](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2086))
* Support models provided by the Mistral AI API (by @Olyxz16 in [#2053](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2053))
* Models List: Add Ghost 7B v0.9.1 (by @lh0x00 in [#2127](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2127))
* Add Documentation and FAQ links to the New Chat page (by @3Simplex in [#2183](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2183))
* Models List: Simplify Mistral OpenOrca system prompt ([#2220](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2220))
* Models List: Add Llama 3 Instruct ([#2242](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2242))
* Models List: Add Phi-3 Mini Instruct ([#2252](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2252))
* Improve accuracy of anonymous usage statistics ([#2238](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2238))
## Fixes
* Detect unsupported CPUs correctly on Windows ([#2141](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2141))
* Fix the colors used by the server chat ([#2150](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2150))
* Fix startup issues when encountering non-Latin characters in paths ([#2162](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2162))
* Fix issues causing LocalDocs context links to not work sometimes ([#2218](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2218))
* Fix incorrect display of certain code block syntax in the chat ([#2232](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2232))
* Fix an issue causing unnecessary indexing of document collections on startup ([#2236](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2236))
## New Contributors
* @kryotek777 made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2108
* @xuzhen made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1928
* @Olyxz16 made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2053
* @bentleylong made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2138
* @Tim453 made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2136
* @lh0x00 made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2127
* @robinverduijn made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2180
* @3Simplex made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2183
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/compare/v2.7.3...v2.7.4
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v2.7.4, a right-click menu is added to the chat, the left sidebar is changed to stay open, text width in chat is limited, the SBert implementation is moved to llama.cpp's, support for models provided by the Mistral AI API is added, Ghost 7B v0.9.1, Llama 3 Instruct, and Phi-3 Mini Instruct are added to the models list, documentation and FAQ links are added to the New Chat page, the Mistral OpenOrca system prompt is simplified, and accuracy of anonymous usage statistics is improved. Fixes include detecting unsupported CPUs on Windows, fixing server chat colors, startup issues with non-Latin characters in paths, LocalDocs context links not working, incorrect code block syntax display, and unnecessary indexing of document collections on startup.

chunks.title: v2.8.0-pre1
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all
Release: v2.8.0-pre1
Tag: v2.8.0-pre1; draft: False; prerelease: True; published_at: 2024-05-15T23:37:04Z; created_at: 2024-05-15T22:12:32Z
Release notes:
## What's New
* Context Menu: Replace "Select All" on message with "Copy Message" ([#2324](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2324))
* Context Menu: Hide Copy/Cut when nothing is selected ([#2324](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2324))
* Improve speed of context switch after quickly switching between several chats ([#2343](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2343))
* New Chat: Always switch to the new chat when the button is clicked ([#2330](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2330))
* New Chat: Always scroll to the top of the list when the button is clicked ([#2330](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2330))
* Update to latest llama.cpp as of May 9, 2024 ([#2310](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2310))
* **Add support for the llama.cpp CUDA backend** ([#2310](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2310))
* Nomic Vulkan is still used by default, but CUDA devices can now be selected in Settings
* When in use: Greatly improved prompt processing and generation speed on some devices
* When in use: GPU support for Q5\_0, Q5\_1, Q8\_0, K-quants, I-quants, and Mixtral
* Add support for InternLM models ([#2310](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2310))
## Fixes
* Do not allow sending a message while the LLM is responding ([#2323](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2323))
* Fix poor quality of generated chat titles with many models ([#2322](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2322))
* Set the window icon correctly on Windows ([#2321](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2321))
* Fix a few memory leaks ([#2328](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2328), [#2348](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2348), [#2310](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2310))
* Do not crash if a model file has no architecture key ([#2346](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2346))
* Fix several instances of model loading progress displaying incorrectly ([#2337](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2337), [#2343](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2343))
* New Chat: Fix the new chat being scrolled above the top of the list on startup ([#2330](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2330))
* macOS: Show a "Metal" device option, and actually use the CPU when "CPU" is selected ([#2310](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2310))
* Remove unsupported Mamba, Persimmon, and PLaMo models from the whitelist ([#2310](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2310))
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/compare/v2.7.5...v2.8.0-pre1
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all pre-release v2.8.0-pre1, the context menu replaces 'Select All' on a message with 'Copy Message' and hides Copy/Cut when nothing is selected. The speed of context switch after quickly switching between several chats is improved. New Chat behavior is changed to always switch to the new chat and scroll to the top of the list when the button is clicked. The llama.cpp backend is updated as of May 9, 2024, adding support for the llama.cpp CUDA backend (with Nomic Vulkan still default, CUDA devices selectable in Settings, greatly improved prompt processing and generation speed on some devices, and GPU support for Q5_0, Q5_1, Q8_0, K-quants, I-quants, and Mixtral) and support for InternLM models. Fixes include preventing sending a message while the LLM is responding, fixing poor quality of generated chat titles with many models, setting the window icon correctly on Windows, fixing memory leaks, not crashing if a model file has no architecture key, fixing model loading progress display, fixing new chat scrolling above the top of the list on startup, showing a 'Metal' device option on macOS and actually using CPU when 'CPU' is selected, and removing unsupported Mamba, Persimmon, and PLaMo models from the whitelist.

chunks.title: v3.0.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all
Release: v3.0.0
Tag: v3.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-07-02T16:13:06Z; created_at: 2024-07-02T01:11:32Z
Release notes:
## What's New
* Complete UI overhaul ([#2396](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2396))
* LocalDocs improvements ([#2396](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2396))
* Use nomic-embed-text-v1.5 as local model instead of SBert
* Ship local model with application instead of downloading afterwards
* Store embeddings flat in SQLite DB instead of in hnswlib index
* Do exact KNN search with usearch instead of approximate KNN search with hnswlib
* Markdown support ([#2476](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2476))
* Support CUDA/Metal device option for embeddings ([#2477](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2477))
## Fixes
* Fix embedding tokenization after [#2310](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2310) ([#2381](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2381))
* Fix a crash when loading certain models with "code" in their name ([#2382](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2382))
* Fix an embedding crash with large chunk sizes after [#2310](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2310) ([#2383](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2383))
* Fix inability to load models with non-ASCII path on Windows ([#2388](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2388))
* CUDA: Do not show non-fatal DLL errors on Windows ([#2389](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2389))
* LocalDocs fixes ([#2396](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2396))
* Always use requested number of snippets even if there are better matches in unselected collections
* Check for deleted files on startup
* CUDA: Fix PTX errors with some GPT4All builds ([#2421](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2421))
* Fix blank device in UI after model switch and improve usage stats ([#2409](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2409))
* Use CPU instead of CUDA backend when GPU loading fails the first time (ngl=0 is not enough) ([#2477](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2477))
* Fix crash when sending a message greater than n\_ctx tokens after [#1970](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/1970) ([#2498](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2498))
## New Contributors
* @woheller69 made their first contribution in ([#2339](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2339))
* @patcher9 made their first contribution in ([#2386](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2386))
* @sunsided made their first contribution in ([#2414](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2414))
* @johnwparent made their first contribution in ([#2319](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2319))
* @mcembalest made their first contribution in ([#2488](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2488))

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v3.0.0, a complete UI overhaul is performed. LocalDocs is improved by using nomic-embed-text-v1.5 as the local model instead of SBert, shipping the local model with the application instead of downloading afterwards, storing embeddings flat in SQLite DB instead of in hnswlib index, and doing exact KNN search with usearch instead of approximate KNN search with hnswlib. Markdown support is added, and CUDA/Metal device option for embeddings is supported. Fixes include embedding tokenization after #2310, a crash when loading certain models with 'code' in their name, an embedding crash with large chunk sizes after #2310, inability to load models with non-ASCII path on Windows, non-fatal DLL errors on Windows with CUDA, LocalDocs fixes (always using requested number of snippets even if better matches in unselected collections, checking for deleted files on startup), CUDA PTX errors with some builds, blank device in UI after model switch and improved usage stats, using CPU instead of CUDA backend when GPU loading fails the first time, and a crash when sending a message greater than n_ctx tokens after #1970.

chunks.title: v3.1.1-web_search_beta_2
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all
Release: v3.1.1-web_search_beta_2
Tag: v3.1.1-web_search_beta_2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-07-27T22:45:27Z; created_at: 2024-07-27T20:52:09Z
Release notes:
This is version 2 of the web search beta which contains some important fixes including upstream llama.cpp fixes for Llama 3.1.
## Fixes
- Update to latest llama.cpp which includes RoPE fix
- Fix problem with only displaying one source for tool call excerpts
- Add the extra snippets to the source excerpts
- Fix the way we're injecting the context back into the model for web search
- Change the suggestion mode to turn on for tool calls by default
WARNING:
There was a problem with the synchronization between this beta release and the models.json. In order to make this work you have to perform the following steps:
1) Rename the file `Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct-128k-Q4_0.gguf`  to `Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct-Q4_0.gguf`
2) Copy the following into the prompt template:
```
<|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>
%1<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>
%2
```
3) Copy the following into the system prompt:
```
<|start_header_id|>system<|end_header_id|>
Environment: ipython
Tools: brave_search
Cutting Knowledge Date: December 2023
Today Date: 25 Jul 2024
You are a helpful assistant.<|eot_id|>
```
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v3.1.1-web_search_beta_2, version 2 of the web search beta includes important fixes: updating to latest llama.cpp with RoPE fix, fixing display of only one source for tool call excerpts, adding extra snippets to source excerpts, fixing the way context is injected back into the model for web search, and changing the suggestion mode to turn on for tool calls by default. A warning notes a synchronization problem requiring manual renaming of the model file and copying prompt template and system prompt.

Tag: v3.2.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-08-12T21:32:03Z; created_at: 2024-08-12T21:11:04Z
Release notes:
## Added
- Add Qwen2-1.5B-Instruct to models3.json (by @ThiloteE in [#2759](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2759))
- Enable translation feature for seven languages: English, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, Chinese Simplified, Chinese Traditional, Romanian ([#2830](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2830))
## Changed
- Add missing entries to Italian transltation (by @Harvester62 in [#2783](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2783))
- Use llama\_kv\_cache ops to shift context faster ([#2781](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2781))
- Don't stop generating at end of context ([#2781](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2781))
## Fixed
- Case-insensitive LocalDocs source icon detection (by @cosmic-snow in [#2761](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2761))
- Fix comparison of pre- and post-release versions for update check and models3.json ([#2762](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2762), [#2772](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2772))
- Fix several backend issues ([#2778](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2778))
- Restore leading space removal logic that was incorrectly removed in [#2694](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2694)
- CUDA: Cherry-pick llama.cpp DMMV cols requirement fix that caused a crash with long conversations since [#2694](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2694)
- Make reverse prompt detection work more reliably and prevent it from breaking output ([#2781](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2781))
- Disallow context shift for chat name and follow-up generation to prevent bugs ([#2781](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2781))
- Explicitly target macOS 12.6 in CI to fix Metal compatibility on older macOS ([#2846](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2846))
## New Contributors
* @SINAPSA-IC made their first contribution in https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/pull/2828
**Full Changelog**: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/blob/main/gpt4all-chat/CHANGELOG.md#320---2024-08-12)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v3.2.0, Qwen2-1.5B-Instruct is added to models3.json, and the translation feature is enabled for seven languages: English, Spanish, Italian, Portuguese, Chinese Simplified, Chinese Traditional, Romanian. Missing entries are added to the Italian translation. llama_kv_cache ops are used to shift context faster, and generation no longer stops at end of context. Fixes include case-insensitive LocalDocs source icon detection, comparison of pre- and post-release versions for update check and models3.json, several backend issues, restoring leading space removal logic, a CUDA crash with long conversations since #2694, making reverse prompt detection work more reliably and preventing it from breaking output, disallowing context shift for chat name and follow-up generation to prevent bugs, and explicitly targeting macOS 12.6 in CI to fix Metal compatibility on older macOS.

Release notes:
## What's New
* **UI Improvements**: The minimum window size now adapts to the font size. A few labels and links have been fixed. The Embeddings Device selection of "Auto"/"Application default" works again. The window icon is now set on Linux. The antenna icon now displays when the API server is listening.
* **Single Instance**: Only one instance of GPT4All can be opened at a time. This is now enforced.
* **Greedy Sampling**: Set temperature to zero to enable greedy sampling.
* **API Server Changes**: The built-in API server now responds correctly to both legacy completions, and chats with message history. Also, it now uses the system prompt configured in the UI.
* **Translation Improvements**: The Italian, Romanian, and Traditional Chinese translations have been updated.
## Contributors

* 3Simplex (`@3Simplex`)
* Riccardo Giovanetti (`@Harvester62`)
* Victor Emanuel (`@SINAPSA-IC`)
* Dominik (`@cosmic-snow`)
* Shiranui (`@supersonictw`)
**Full Changelog**: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/blob/main/gpt4all-chat/CHANGELOG.md#330---2024-09-20)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v3.3.0, UI improvements include the minimum window size adapting to font size, fixing labels and links, the Embeddings Device selection of 'Auto'/'Application default' working again, setting the window icon on Linux, and displaying an antenna icon when the API server is listening. Only one instance of GPT4All can be opened at a time. Greedy sampling is enabled by setting temperature to zero. The built-in API server now responds correctly to both legacy completions and chats with message history, and uses the system prompt configured in the UI. The Italian, Romanian, and Traditional Chinese translations are updated.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all
Release: v3.4.0
Tag: v3.4.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-10-08T20:10:50Z; created_at: 2024-10-08T16:21:47Z
Release notes:
## What's New
* **Attached Files:** You can now attach a small Microsoft Excel spreadsheet (.xlsx) to a chat message and ask the model about it.
* Read more [here](https://docs.gpt4all.io/gpt4all_desktop/cookbook/use-local-ai-models-to-privately-chat-with-microsoft-excel.html).
* **LocalDocs Accuracy:** The LocalDocs algorithm has been enhanced to find more accurate references for some queries.
* **Word Document Support:** LocalDocs now supports Microsoft Word (.docx) documents natively.
* **IMPORTANT NOTE:** If .docx files are not found, make sure Settings > LocalDocs > Allowed File Extensions includes "docx".
* **Forgetful Model Fixes:** Issues with the "Redo last chat response" button, and with continuing chats from previous sessions, have been fixed.
* **Chat Saving Improvements:** On exit, GPT4All will no longer save chats that are not new or modified. As a bonus, downgrading without losing access to all chats will be possible in the future, should the need arise.
* **UI Fixes:** The model list no longer scrolls to the top when you start downloading a model.
* **New Models:** Llama 3.2 Instruct 3B and 1B models are now available in the model list.
## Contributors
* Jared Van Bortel (Nomic AI)
* Adam Treat (Nomic AI)
* Andriy Mulyar (Nomic AI)
* Ikko Eltociear Ashimine (`@eltociear`)
* Victor Emanuel (`@SINAPSA-IC`)
* Shiranui (`@supersonictw`)
**Full Changelog**: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/blob/main/gpt4all-chat/CHANGELOG.md#340---2024-10-08)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v3.4.0, attached files support is added for Microsoft Excel spreadsheets (.xlsx). The LocalDocs algorithm is enhanced for more accurate references, and Microsoft Word (.docx) documents are supported natively (with a note to ensure 'docx' is in allowed file extensions). Issues with the 'Redo last chat response' button and continuing chats from previous sessions are fixed. On exit, GPT4All no longer saves chats that are not new or modified, enabling future downgrading without losing access to all chats. The model list no longer scrolls to the top when starting a download. Llama 3.2 Instruct 3B and 1B models are added to the model list.

Release: v3.5.0
Tag: v3.5.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-12-09T21:52:34Z; created_at: 2024-12-09T19:41:40Z
Release notes:
## What's New
* **Message Editing:**
* You can now edit your any message you sent by clicking the pencil icon below it.
* You can now redo earlier responses in the conversation.
* **Templates:** Chat templates have been completely overhauled! They now use Jinja-style syntax. You may notice warnings or errors in the UI. Read the linked docs,   and if you have any questions, please ask on the Discord.
* **File Attachments:** Markdown and plain text files are now supported as file attachments.
* **System Tray:** There is now an option in Application Settings to allow GPT4All to minimize to the system tray instead of closing.
* **Local API Server:**
* The API server now supports system messages from the client and no longer uses the system message in settings.
* You can now send messages to the API server in any order supported by the model instead of just user/assistant pairs.
* **Translations:** The Italian and Romanian translations have been improved.
## Contributors
* Jared Van Bortel (Nomic AI)
* Adam Treat (Nomic AI)
* Benjamin Gallois (`@bgallois`)
* Riccardo Giovanetti (`@Harvester62`)
* Victor Emanuel (`@SINAPSA-IC`)
**Full Changelog**: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/blob/main/gpt4all-chat/CHANGELOG.md#350---2024-12-09)

chunks.title: v3.7.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all Release: v3.7.0 Tag: v3.7.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-01-23T20:17:29Z; created_at: 2025-01-22T15:30:49Z Release notes: ## What's New * **Windows ARM Support:** GPT4All now supports the Windows ARM platform, ensuring compatibility with devices powered by Qualcomm Snapdragon and Microsoft SQ-series processors. * **NOTE:** Support for GPU and/or NPU acceleration is not available at this time. Only the CPU will be used to run LLMs. * **NOTE:** You must install the new *Windows ARM* version of GPT4All from the website. The standard *Windows* version will not work due to emulation limitations. * **Fixed Updating on macOS:** The maintenance tool no longer crashes when attempting to update or uninstall GPT4All on Sequoia. * **NOTE:** If you have installed the version from the GitHub releases as a workaround for this issue, you can safely uninstall it and switch back to the version from the website. * **Fixed Chat Saving on macOS:** Chats now save as expected when the application is quit with Command-Q. * **Code Interpreter Improvements:** * The behavior when the code takes too long to execute and times out has been improved. * console.log now accepts multiple arguments for better compatibility with native JavaScript. * **Chat Templating Improvements:** * Two crashes and one compatibility issue have been fixed in the chat template parser. * The default chat template for EM German Mistral has been fixed. * Automatic replacements have been added for five new models as we continue to improve compatibility with common chat templates. ## Contributors * Jared Van Bortel (Nomic AI) * Adam Treat (Nomic AI) * Riccardo Giovanetti (`@Harvester62`) **Full Changelog**: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/blob/main/gpt4all-chat/CHANGELOG.md#370---2025-01-21)

**Note:** Please be careful when downloading an offline installer below. There is now a `-win64-arm` installer. If you have an ARM processor (e.g. Qualcomm Snapdragon or Microsoft SQ-series), use the `-win64-arm` one. If you have an Intel or AMD processor, or if unsure, use the `-win64` one.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v3.7.0, Windows ARM support is added for devices with Qualcomm Snapdragon and Microsoft SQ-series processors, though only CPU is used for LLMs and a separate Windows ARM installer is required. Updating on macOS is fixed so the maintenance tool no longer crashes on Sequoia, and chat saving on macOS is fixed when quitting with Command-Q. Code interpreter improvements include better timeout behavior and console.log accepting multiple arguments. Chat templating improvements fix two crashes and one compatibility issue in the parser, fix the default chat template for EM German Mistral, and add automatic replacements for five new models.

chunks.title: v3.8.0
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: nomic-ai/gpt4all
Release: v3.8.0
Tag: v3.8.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-01-31T01:07:03Z; created_at: 2025-01-30T23:16:20Z
Release notes:
## What's New
* **Native DeepSeek-R1-Distill Support:** GPT4All now has robust support for the DeepSeek-R1 family of distillations.
* Several model variants are now available on the downloads page.
* Reasoning (wrapped in "think" tags) is displayed similarly to the Reasoner model.
* The DeepSeek-R1 Qwen pretokenizer is now supported, resolving the loading failure in previous versions.
* The model is now configured with a GPT4All-compatible prompt template by default.
* **Chat Templating Overhaul:** The template parser has been *completely* replaced with one that has much better compatibility with common models.
* **Code Interpreter Fixes:**
* An issue preventing the code interpreter from logging a single string in v3.7.0 has been fixed.
* The UI no longer freezes while the code interpreter is running a computation.
* **Local Server Fixes:**
* An issue preventing the server from using LocalDocs after the first request since v3.5.0 has been fixed.
* System messages are now correctly hidden from the message history.
## Contributors
* Jared Van Bortel (Nomic AI)
* Adam Treat (Nomic AI)
* ThiloteE (`@ThiloteE`)
**Full Changelog**: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/nomic-ai/gpt4all/blob/main/gpt4all-chat/CHANGELOG.md#380---2025-01-30)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the nomic-ai/gpt4all release v3.8.0, native DeepSeek-R1-Distill support is added with several model variants available on the downloads page, reasoning displayed similarly to the Reasoner model, the DeepSeek-R1 Qwen pretokenizer supported, and a GPT4All-compatible prompt template configured by default. The chat templating parser is completely replaced with one having much better compatibility with common models. Code interpreter fixes address an issue preventing logging a single string in v3.7.0 and the UI freezing while the code interpreter runs. Local server fixes address an issue preventing the server from using LocalDocs after the first request since v3.5.0 and system messages being correctly hidden from message history.

Tag: v3.10.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-02-25T00:41:39Z; created_at: 2025-02-24T22:16:14Z
Release notes:
## What's New
* **Remote Models:**
* The Add Model page now has a dedicated tab for remote model providers.
* Groq, OpenAI, and Mistral remote models are now easier to configure.
* **CUDA Compatibility:** GPUs with CUDA compute capability 5.0 such as the GTX 750 are now supported by the CUDA backend.
* **New Model:** The non-MoE Granite model is now supported.
* **Translation Updates:**
* The Italian translation has been updated.
* The Simplified Chinese translation has been significantly improved.
* **Better Chat Templates:** The default chat templates for OLMoE 7B 0924/0125 and Granite 3.1 3B/8B have been improved.
* **Whitespace Fixes:** DeepSeek-R1-based models now have better whitespace behavior in their output.
* **Crash Fixes:** Several issues that could potentially cause GPT4All to crash have been fixed.
